mapper.sql: select l.leave_id, l.applicant_user_id, l.approver_user_id, l.leave_type, l.leave_title, l.leave_reason, l.start_time, l.end_time, l.leave_days, l.leave_status, l.contact_phone, l.audit_remark, l.audit_time, l.revoke_time, l.create_by, l.create_time, l.update_by, l.update_time, l.remark, au.nick_name as applicant_user_name, ad.dept_name as applicant_dept_name, pu.nick_name as approver_user_name from campus_leave_apply l left join sys_user au on l.applicant_user_id = au.user_id left join sys_dept ad on au.dept_id = ad.dept_id left join sys_user pu on l.approver_user_id = pu.user_id
mapper.update: update campus_leave_apply set del_flag = '2' where leave_id in #{leaveId}

update campus_leave_apply set leave_status = #{leaveStatus}, approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where leave_id = #{leaveId}
update campus_leave_apply set leave_status = '3', revoke_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where leave_id = #{leaveId}
